title: Software Update - DFU - Perform DFU with no internet [New]
scenario: Perform DFU with no internet connection and verify appropriate error handling when Wi-Fi is off
steps: Pair headset and launch app, then turn off Wi-Fi.
Go to Device Settings > Software Update.
Tap the Update button - expect 'Feature unavailable' dialog.
Turn on Wi-Fi and tap Update again - expect 3-step DFU screens.
Turn off Wi-Fi and tap Continue - expect 'Feature unavailable' dialog.
expected: When Wi-Fi is off, tapping Update or Continue should show the 'Feature unavailable' dialog. When Wi-Fi is on, tapping Update should show the 3-step DFU screens.
